title: nephrolepis cordifolia var. pendula
intro: Nephrolepis cordifolia var. pendula, also known as the Boston fern, is a variety of the nephrolepis cordifolia plant, which is a type of fern that is native to tropical regions of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of the Boston fern include improving respiratory health, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin irritations and wounds.
